species: We applied engineered ascorbate peroxidase APEX2-based subcellular proteomics to catalog proximal proteins of phytotransferrin in the model marine diatom Phaeodactylum tricornutum.
sample_source: We applied engineered ascorbate peroxidase APEX2-based subcellular proteomics to catalog proximal proteins of phytotransferrin in the model marine diatom Phaeodactylum tricornutum.
cell_line: To confirm pTF association with intracellular vesicles as suggested by, a pTF-mCherry encoding episome was conjugated into ΔpTF P. tricornutum cells.
strain: Sequenced Phaeodactylum tricornutum strain CCMP632 (synonymous to CCMP2561 and CCAP 1055/1; National Center for Marine Algae and Microbiota (NCMA), East Boothbay, ME) was used throughout the study...
